calendar.matters:
Quiet Title - Real Property, In Scd.
Off Calendar May-25-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on for hearing on Quiet Title-Real Property.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Marta Vallejo, CSR:Sara Lerschen.

Appearances:
Gilbert J. Premo,Esq. for Plaintiff: Marie Warrington and Ronald Warrington.
Mr. Warrington, was sworn & examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff: Ronald and Marie Warrington and against the defendants: Marc A. Lumer, Scott C. Brown and Alan Young
as follows: The documents referred to as "the purported storage exchange agreement", did not form, and do not form or represent any legally binding or enforceable contract or agreement and validity rescinded and is otherwise invalid and unenforceable.
Plaintiff's shall recover their costs of suit.
Judgment signed in open court.

Quiet Title - Real Property, In Scd.
